# Summary

<!-- One paragraph of what changes and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Pick at least one. -->

- [ ] feat (new functionality)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] docs (documentation only)
- [ ] chore (build / tooling / infra)
- [ ] security
- [ ] breaking change

## Changelog updated

- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` in the **Unreleased** section with a user-visible entry for this PR.

> CI enforces this — the `Changelog updated` check will fail if `CHANGELOG.md` is not in the diff.
> Docs-only changes to files under `docs/` are exempt; the CI check skips changelog enforcement when the only changed files are docs.

## Test plan

<!-- Bulleted checklist of what was tested. -->

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] Manual walkthrough of the affected surface

## Screenshots / output

<!-- If UI changed, paste before/after. If a new flow, link to the spec/plan in `docs/superpowers/`. -->
